discussion_comments.comment_body: I think we only want to remove the bottom padding for mobile, right? We should probably add the padding as spacing in the container rather than directly on the logo div.
Sure, it was looking fine removing the mb-2, but I can do that too. I'll update it in few hours. I'm off now, thanks for the review

I guess this is easier said than done since the element that determines the gap [is deep in the fumadocs code](https://github.com/fuma-nama/fumadocs/blob/2fde2168acc1cc9a8374ad303c49611ebdf543bd/packages/ui/src/components/layout/sidebar.tsx#L187) and is not directly editable 😅 

I guess that leaves you with making this conditional with whatever breakpoint triggers the mobile layout.
I've updated this and this is how it looks like, it's fine for me, let me know if you'd like other changes
